685000000000000000000002 description: Concordia had security before it had ghosts. Cameras, guards, records, keys, people who looked the other way when paid. One of my old ledgers is still sitting in that security room. Names, routes, rooms, things that should not be read by strangers. Go to Streets, find the Concordia security room, recover the ledger, and leave alive. Do not make a scene.
685000000000000000000002 note: Tony wants you to recover an old security ledger from the Concordia security room on Streets.
685000000000000000000002 startedMessageT: Go to Streets. Concordia security room. Find my ledger and bring it back clean.
685000000000000000000002 successMessageT: Good. That ledger in the wrong hands would have made problems. You followed instructions and kept your head down. That matters.
685000000000000000000002 failMessageText: You either lost the trail or made too much noise following it.
685000000000000000000002 declinePlayerMe: Not going into Concordia for that yet.
685000000000000000000002 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the Concordia ledger recovered quietly.
685000000000000000000034: Locate Tony's ledger in the Concordia security room
